name: Uncle Ying
bio:
Mysterious Taoist from the East, good at subduing demons and exorcising evil, upholding the belief of protecting humans. Wearing a yellow Taoist robe, he uses Taoist swords and talismans to walk the dangerous path for justice.

Role: AOE Heal Reduction
Specialty: A Group Breakthrough-type hero that can deal damage to multiple enemies and apply Heal Reduction effects.

skillSlots.name: Heaven's Fivefold Thunder
skillSlots.description: Attacks 3 random targets for 160% M.DMG with 40% probability to apply [Sigil].

skillSlots.name: Exterminate Evildoers
skillSlots.description: Attacks 4 targets for total 700% M.DMG (single target cannot take more than 3.5x Uncle Ying's ATK, cannot trigger Magic Combo).

effects.name: Maoshan Arts
effects.description: Gains 1 stack of [Amulet] whenever an enemy is [Sealed].

effects.name: Maoshan Arts
effects.description: 30% probability to gain 1 stack of [Amulet] when enemies are inflicted with [Sigil] (max 2 triggers per turn).

effects.name: Maoshan Arts
effects.description: At 5 stacks of [Amulet], increases Crit Rate by 50%.

effects.name: Maoshan Arts
effects.description: Deals extra M.DMG equal to 20% of target's Max HP when attacking [Sealed] Targets.
